violations.text: Old droppings were observed behind the freezer and inside of the sliding door cabinet holding miscellaneous tools/paperwork. Area to be thoroughly cleaned and monitored. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (tomatoes) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Tomatoes were disposed of. Proper glove used reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Can opener brought to 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Various foods in the prep unit was observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food in bottom of unit was relocated. Top of prep unit to be used in half portions. Unit to be serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Prep unit was observed with a slightly elevated ambient temperature. Unit to be serviced and repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The floors behind the freezer in the kitchen area and shelving in the server area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the cupboard behind the counter have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Shelf to be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
The tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

All foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by a large accumulation of droppings throughout the facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
2 dead rodents were observed on a glue trap. PIC disposed of rodents at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the front counter area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. The non food contact surfaces of various shelving has an accumulation of droppings. Shelving to be sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (Chipped tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

At the time of inspection, work was observed to have continued in repairing floors/walls/ceiling... - Damaged wall coverings and floors under/behind sinks and equipment to be repaired - Placement of new wall-to-floor coving in areas where wall coverings have been replaced Per the PIC, work is to continue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The floor in the kitchen area was observed to have droppings/old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the pest control program. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed along floors/walls and on non food contact surfaces. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to obtain pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repairs have been made to the door. Gaps to be covered/sealed New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris at the time of inspection... - Speed rack shelves - Storage Shelves - Dry ingredients containers - Plumbing pipes and plumbing related items below sinks New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

At the time of inspection, work was observed to have continued in repairing floors/walls/ceiling... - Loose/missing ceiling tiles to be replaced - Damaged wall coverings and floors under/behind sinks and equipment to be repaired Per the PIC, work is to continue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2023

At the time of inspection, the physical facilities (chipped/missing tile on floors, cracked wall boards, replacing/cleaning ceiling tiles) in the kitchen area are continued to be fixed/repaired since previous re-inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2023
